title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.080 - County seat commissioners to select new county seat, where
text:
47.080.  County seat commissioners to select new county seat, where. — When the commissioners, or a majority of them, shall have been duly qualified, they shall select the most suitable place in said county, within one mile of the place designated in the petition, whereon to erect the public buildings.
(RSMo 1939 § 13738) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12079; 1919 § 9479; 1909 § 3700
